_comment: D5 fixture for /demos/chat-slots. The demo wires three custom slots (welcomeScreen, input.disclaimer, messageView.assistantMessage = CustomAssistantMessage). The D5 assertion verifies CustomAssistantMessage actually wraps assistant replies in DOM (data-testid='custom-assistant-message') after the user sends a message. One-turn fixture — substring 'verify chat slots are wired' is unique across the d5-all bundle.

response.content: Confirmed — the chat-slots demo is rendering through the custom slot wrappers. The CustomAssistantMessage component should be visible as a tinted card with a 'slot' badge in the corner.
